title: test(1796f): add 17 tests for internal-chat-account-ops.ts (6 functions, 0 prior coverage)
body:
## Summary

17 new tests covering all 6 exported functions in internal-chat-account-ops.ts. Zero prior coverage.

### Functions covered

| Function | Tests | Key scenarios |
|---|---|---|
| createExternalChatGroup | 4 | creates group + admin membership, verifies external account, ChatGroupAlreadyExistsError |
| ensureDirectConversationByAccount | 3 | returns conversation keys, verifies both accounts, throws on null return |
| addMemberToGroupByAccount | 3 | adds new member (default role normal), returns existing list without insert when already exists |
| updateMemberRoleByAccount | 2 | updates role via db.update, verifies group first |
| removeMemberFromGroupByAccount | 2 | removes member via db.delete, verifies group first |
| updateGroupByAccount | 3 | updates name, falls back to existing name if undefined, always returns members list |

### Key behavioral insight

`updateGroupByAccount` always calls `db.update` (using `input.name ?? group.name` as fallback) and always returns the result of `listGroupMembersByAccount` — not a `{success: true, name}` object.

All 17 tests pass.
Part of #1796 coverage expansion.
head: fix/1796f-internal-chat-account-ops-tests
